S.FORM: Juan Carlos Varela I 1963 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Carlos Varela, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Panama anini i ci Juan Carlos Varela, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *o~u~uan ¶ar…ĺo~us b~var…ô…ĺa i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~u~uan ¶ar…ĺo~us b~var…ô…ĺa, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u panama anini i ¶i *o~u~uan ¶ar…ĺo~us b~var…ô…ĺa, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Juan Carlos Varela I 1963 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Carlos Varela, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Panama anini i ci Juan Carlos Varela, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
